title: Dead `notes` accumulator returned from find_matches
evidence: bsoccer/queries.py:91 declares `notes: list[str] = []` and queries.py:124 returns it, but it is never appended to — always an empty list in the tool's `data`
suggestion: Either populate notes (e.g. record fallback team resolutions) or drop the field

title: date_from/date_to coerce invalid input to NaT, silently filtering all rows
evidence: bsoccer/queries.py:114-116 uses pd.to_datetime(..., errors='coerce'); a malformed date_from becomes NaT and `df[df['date'] >= NaT]` yields an empty result with no error
suggestion: Validate the parsed bound and return an explicit error when a supplied date string is unparseable

title: Parallel argparse CLI provided beyond the MCP requirement
evidence: bsoccer/cli.py exposes matches/record/h2h/players/standings/champion/seasons/stats/biggest subcommands mirroring the MCP tools
suggestion: None — useful for manual demo/testing without an MCP client

title: Extra query tools beyond the required set
evidence: bsoccer/server.py registers players_by_club, list_seasons, and top_scoring_teams in addition to the 8 tools the spec strictly requires
suggestion: None — broadens coverage of the spec's example questions

title: Cross-file Brasileirao deduplication for accurate aggregates
evidence: bsoccer/data.py:236 matches_dedup collapses overlapping rows across Brasileirao_Matches/novo_campeonato/BR-Football before standings and stats
